name: Enterprise Architect
description: Reads from both requirements and security-baseline contracts, then designs the overall system architecture: layers, service boundaries, and tech stack decisions.

checks.prompt: Review the monorepo structure and design an enterprise application architecture. Specify: (1) application layers (presentation, business, data), (2) service boundaries, (3) inter-service communication pattern, (4) deployment topology. Be concrete and opinionated.

Based on the architecture, specify the technology stack: (1) backend runtime + framework, (2) database engine, (3) auth strategy, (4) message queue (if needed), (5) observability stack. Justify each choice in one sentence. Context: {retryContext}
